utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The format requires 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all of these. Each item is fully specified: 
1) destination – city and country provided.
2) travel_dates – specific dates provided.
3) transportation – flight details with cost and relevant details.
4) accommodation – hotel name, type, location, room details, amenities, cost all provided.
5) activities – list of activities, operator, accessibility, cost all provided.
6) additional_services – dining details with restaurant, cuisine, price, and special accommodations provided.
7) total_budget – currency, total cost, and breakdown included. All items are complete and detailed.
